⚔️ Malenia, Blade of Miquella - Ultimate Boss Guide

Boss Overview

  • Location: Haligtree Roots (Consecrated Snowfield → Miquella's Haligtree → Elphael, Brace of the Haligtree)
  • Recommended Level: 120-150
  • Phase Count: 2 phases (transforms at 50% HP)
  • Difficulty: ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ (Hardest boss in base game)

⚠️ Why Malenia is Brutal

Malenia heals on every hit she lands — even blocked hits. This means defensive play alone won't win. You need aggressive dodging and burst damage windows.

🗡️ Phase 1 Moveset Breakdown

Phase 1 is learnable. Here are her 5 most dangerous attacks:

1. Waterfowl Dance (The Killer Move)

Her signature attack. She leaps, pauses, then unleashes a 3-part flurry:

  1. First flurry: 3 rapid slashes
  2. Second flurry: 5 rapid slashes
  3. Final flurry: 7 rapid slashes
✅ How to Dodge: Back away during the pause. When she starts the first flurry, run directly away from her. For the second and third flurries, you must dodge-roll into her (toward her hitbox) to slip between the blade swings.
💡 Alternative: Use Bloodhound's Step ash of war to roll through the attack invincibly.

2. Quick Slash Combo

A fast 2-3 hit combo. She telegraphs with a slight wind-up, then strikes horizontally.

✅ How to Dodge: Roll toward her right side (her sword arm). Stay close and punish after the last hit.

3. Thrusting Sweep

She pulls her blade back for a long thrust, then sweeps in an arc.

✅ How to Dodge: Roll perpendicular to her thrust direction (to the side, not back). Roll through the sword during the sweep.

4. Aerial Dive

She leaps high and plunges downward with a spinning slash.

✅ How to Dodge: Sprint away from the shadow on the ground. Roll when the shadow stops moving.

5. Spinning Slash

A 360-degree horizontal spin attack. Looks unavoidable but has a tell.

✅ How to Dodge: Roll directly into her as she starts spinning. You'll pass through the blade's sweet spot and take no damage.

🦋 Phase 2: Goddess of Rot

At 50% HP, Malenia transforms. New moves are added to her moveset:

New Attack: Scarlet Rot Bloom

She slams her prosthetic hand into the ground, creating a rotating rot pool.

✅ How to Dodge: Keep moving. The pool rotates clockwise, so strafe counter-clockwise to stay ahead of it.
⚠️ Rot Buildup: If you get hit by the rot pool, you'll start accumulating Scarlet Rot. Bring Preserving Boluses to cure it, or equip Mushroom Crown (+20% immunity).

New Attack: Phantom Slash Wave

She swings her blade, sending a projectile wave of rot energy across the arena.

✅ How to Dodge: Roll perpendicular to the wave (sideways). The wave is narrow and easy to dodge if you don't panic-roll backward.
💡 Phase 2 Strategy: Her Waterfowl Dance now has rot on the final flurry. Use the same dodge pattern, but be extra careful on the last set of slashes — one hit means rot buildup.

🧀 Cheese Strategies (If You Just Want to Win)

Strategy 1: Mimic Tear + Bleed Build

Why it works: The Mimic Tear spirit ash draws aggro, letting you attack safely. Bleed builds proc Blood Loss quickly, which doesn't heal her.

  • Spirit Ash: Mimic Tear (level 10)
  • Weapon: Rivers of Blood (Katana) or Eleonora's Poleblade
  • Ash of War: Bloodflame Blade or Corpse Wax Cutter
  • Talisman: Lord of Blood's Exultation (+20% attack power when blood loss procs nearby)
  • Strategy: Summon Mimic, let it tank. Flank and spam weapon skills to proc bleed. Repeat.

Strategy 2: Magic Spam (Sorcery Build)

Why it works: You can stay at range and avoid most melee attacks entirely.

  • Staff: Lusat's Glintstone Staff or Carian Regal Scepter
  • Spells: Comet Azur (burst), Ranni's Dark Moon (slow + damage), Adula's Moonblade (mobile)
  • Talisman: Radagon Icon (faster casting), Graven-Mass Talisman (+8% sorcery damage)
  • Strategy: Stay at max range. When she approaches, cast Ranni's Dark Moon to slow her, then back off and resume Comet spam.
⚠️ Warning: You still need to dodge Waterfowl Dance. When she starts the leap, immediately sprint away and prepare to dodge-roll into her flurry.

Strategy 3: Bleed + Freeze (Optimal Melee)

Why it works: Bleed procs stagger her, and freeze reduces her damage output. This is the most reliable melee strategy.

  • Weapon: Rivers of Blood (Katana)
  • Ash of War: Bloodflame Blade
  • Off-hand: Ice affinity on second weapon (or use Frost Grease)
  • Talisman: Lord of Blood's Exultation, Rotten Winged Sword Insignia (+attack on consecutive hits)
  • Strategy: Apply frost first, then spam Corpse Piler (weapon skill) to proc bleed. Repeat the cycle.

🛡️ Optimal Builds for Malenia

Melee Build: Bleed Samurai

CategoryEquipment
WeaponRivers of Blood (Katana)
Ash of WarCorpse Piler (built-in) or Bloodflame Blade
Talisman 1Lord of Blood's Exultation (+20% ATK on blood loss)
Talisman 2Rotten Winged Sword Insignia (ramp damage)
Talisman 3Millicent's Prosthesis (+dexterity, +attack on chain)
Talisman 4Green Turtle Talisman (stamina recovery)
Stats PriorityArcane 50 → Vigor 40 → Dexterity 30 → Endurance 25

Magic Build: Comet Sorcerer

CategoryEquipment
StaffLusat's Glintstone Staff (found in Sellia Hideaway)
SpellsComet Azur, Ranni's Dark Moon, Terra Magicus (buff)
Talisman 1Radagon Icon (faster casting)
Talisman 2Graven-Mass Talisman (+8% sorcery damage)
Talisman 3Moon of Nokstella (+memory slots)
Talisman 4Green Turtle Talisman (stamina for dodging)
Stats PriorityIntelligence 60 → Mind 30 → Vigor 40 → Endurance 20

⏱️ Phase Transition Strategy

The transition from Phase 1 to Phase 2 is dangerous. She becomes invulnerable during the transformation cutscene, then immediately attacks.

✅ What to Do:

  1. When her HP hits 50%, immediately sprint away to maximum distance.
  2. During the cutscene, prepare your strongest buff (e.g., Terra Magicus, Flame Grant, or Flask of Wondrous Physick).
  3. As soon as you regain control, keep running. She'll do a ground slam that creates a rot shockwave.
  4. Wait for her recovery animation, then go in with your burst damage.
⚠️ Critical: Do NOT stand still during the transition. Many players die here because they're watching the animation. Keep moving.

🎯 Final Tips

  • Use Mimic Tear. It's not cheating — it's a tool. The distraction alone is worth it.
  • Don't get greedy. Land 2-3 hits, then reposition. Her counter-attacks are lethal.
  • Learn Waterfowl Dance. It's the hardest move, but once you can consistently dodge it, the fight becomes manageable.
  • Bring Preserving Boluses. Craft 10-15 before the fight. Rot will kill you if you're not prepared.
  • Patience wins. Malenia punishes aggression. Wait for openings, don't force them.

📋 Quick Reference Summary

SituationBest Response
Waterfowl DanceRun away → Roll into her for each flurry
Quick ComboRoll to her right side and counter
Thrust AttackRoll perpendicular (sideways)
Aerial DiveSprint from shadow, roll when it stops
Rot Pool (Phase 2)Strafe counter-clockwise to stay ahead
Phase TransitionSprint away, buff up, wait for opening

🏆 You Got This!

Malenia is the ultimate test of patience and skill in Elden Ring. Even if you cheese her, take the time to learn her moveset — it's worth it for the satisfaction of a clean fight. Good luck, Tarnished!
